notes: Reduces false update-failed messages by allowing longer write operations to finish before timing out.
Keeps action popups for successful and failed user actions, with backend-provided failure reasons.
Limits incident, problem, and change emails to explicitly involved users instead of notifying executives by hierarchy.
Displays audit trail timestamps in the user's local system time.
Shows SLA remaining or overdue text clearly instead of negative hour values.
Closes user search dropdowns after selecting a person so lower fields are not blocked.
Adds separate L1 reviewer and CAB approver fields for changes and enforces the correct approver at each approval step.
Adds /incidents as a supported incident-register route so direct links and post-login redirects no longer land on a 404 page.
Keeps the Update Center current-version observation synchronized with the runtime container version.
